title: Warranty Coverage
description: Comprehensive protection on panels, inverters and workmanship.

hero.title: Warranty Coverage
hero.lede: Comprehensive protection on panels, inverters and workmanship.

prose: 25-year linear performance warranty (minimum 80–84% output) and 12–15 year product warranty from tier-one manufacturers.
10–15 years standard; extended warranties available for Fronius, SolarEdge and Sungrow.
10 years or throughput limit (brand dependent) on Tesla Powerwall, Sungrow and BYD systems.
10-year workmanship warranty covering installation defects, roof penetrations and electrical work.
Contact hello@sunterra.com.au or 1300 786 837. We coordinate manufacturer warranty claims on your behalf.
